commit.message:
feat(skill-lifecycle): improve PDCA output with quiet mode & expected effects

🎯 Goal: Reduce intermediate output and show comprehensive final summary

## Changes

### 1. Quiet Mode (Phase Headers)
- Wrap Plan/Do/Check/Act phase headers in `if not self.quiet_mode:`
- Reduces visual noise during PDCA execution

### 2. Execution Time Tracking
- Add `start_time` / `end_time` tracking with `time.time()`
- Display in SESSION OVERVIEW: "Execution Time: X.X초"

### 3. Expected Effects Section (기대 효과)
- New section showing improvement impact:
  - Description 확장 → 트리거 정밀도 향상
  - YAML 구조 수정 → 스킬 로딩 안정화
  - test_cases.json 추가 → 품질 검증 가능
  - references/ 추가 → 문서 점수 향상
  - 전체 통과율 Before → After

### 4. Summary Enhancements
- TOOLS/SKILLS USED section
- File changes with reasoning
- Progress trajectory with Delta

## Example Output
```
🔍 SESSION OVERVIEW:
  • Total Cycles: 2
  • Execution Time: 0.3초
  • Termination: target_achieved

🎯 기대 효과:
  📌 Description 확장 → 트리거 정밀도 향상
  📈 전체 통과율 67% → 83% (+16%)
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: normalize keys before counting real columns in header scan

The header-row detection counted raw SheetJS keys, so invisible Unicode characters
(RTL marks U+200F, BOM U+FEFF, ZWS U+200B embedded in header cells) passed the
!startsWith('__EMPTY') check and inflated the count to ≥2 — causing a row with
only one real field ("0") plus one invisible-char field to be wrongly accepted.

Now the count runs AFTER normalizeKey() so invisible-char columns collapse to ""
and are excluded, matching the same filter applied to the final fields array.

Redesign UI with Tailwind CSS v4 and shadcn-vue components (#13)

## Summary
Completely redesigned the frontend UI by migrating from custom CSS to
Tailwind CSS v4 and adopting shadcn-vue component library. This
modernizes the visual design, improves consistency, and provides better
accessibility and dark mode support.

## Key Changes

### Design System & Styling
- Added Tailwind CSS v4 with custom theme configuration supporting
light/dark modes
- Implemented comprehensive color palette (background, foreground,
primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring)
- Removed all scoped component styles in favor of utility-first Tailwind
classes
- Added smooth transitions and hover states throughout the UI

### New UI Components (shadcn-vue)
- **Card components**: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription,
CardContent, CardFooter
- **Form components**: Input, Button (with multiple variants: default,
destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link)
- **Navigation**: Breadcrumb with BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem,
BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator
- **Feedback**: Badge (with variants), Separator, Skeleton (for loading
states)
- **Utilities**: cn() helper function for merging Tailwind classes with
clsx and tailwind-merge

### Feature Enhancements

**AccessView**
- Redesigned access code form with Card layout and improved visual
hierarchy
- Added copy-to-clipboard functionality for active access codes with
visual feedback (Copy/Check icons)
- Improved error messaging with destructive color styling
- Better organization of active codes section with badges for nicknames

**BrowseView**
- Added search/filter functionality with debounced input (150ms)
- Keyboard shortcut support (press `/` to focus search)
- Loading skeleton states for better perceived performance
- Improved error state with retry button
- Search results feedback when no matches found

**EntryList**
- Redesigned file/folder list with hover effects and better spacing
- Added FileIcon component with intelligent icon selection based on file
type (images, videos, audio, archives, code, spreadsheets,
presentations)
- Download button appears on hover for files
- Improved accessibility with proper ARIA labels
- Better visual distinction between directories and files

**App Layout**
- Sticky header with backdrop blur effect
- Added ThemeToggle component for light/dark mode switching
- Improved spacing and max-width constraints (max-w-4xl)
- Page transitions with fade animation
- Better visual hierarchy with proper typography

**Breadcrumbs**
- Replaced text separators with ChevronRight icons
- Added home icon for root navigation
- Improved styling with proper color states

### New Components
- **FileIcon.vue**: Smart icon component that selects appropriate icons
based on file extensions
- **ThemeToggle.vue**: Dark mode toggle using @vueuse/core color mode
detection

### Dependencies Added
- `@vueuse/core`: Composition utilities (clipboard, color mode,
debounce, event listeners)
- `lucide-vue-next`: Modern icon library
- `radix-vue`: Headless UI primitives
- `class-variance-authority`: Type-safe component variant management
- `tailwind-merge`: Intelligent Tailwind class merging
- `@tailwindcss/vite`: Tailwind CSS v4 Vite plugin

### Configuration Updates
- Updated Vite config with Tailwind CSS plugin and path alias (@/)
- Added comprehensive CSS custom properties for theming
- Configured dark mode support with CSS variables

## Notable Implementation Details
- All components use composition API with `<script setup>`
- Proper use of semantic HTML and ARIA attributes for accessibility
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Consistent spacing and sizing using Tailwind's scale
- Icon usage throughout for better visual communication
- Smooth animations and transitions for better UX
